api_key.description: FullStory API key. Sent as 'Authorization: Basic <api_key>'; never logged.

uid.description: Optional FullStory user id sent as the FS-Uid header. Not currently wired into any request (see docs.md Known limits: the engine's header dialect always hard-errors on an absent secret rather than omitting the header, so an optional secret-sourced header cannot be expressed safely).

base_url.description: FullStory API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
